# Test Molecules Corpus

This directory is copied from `/Users/vincenzobarone/test_molecules`.

It is a versioned regression corpus for demanding GICForge and parser tests.
The files are fixtures: do not edit them to make a test pass. Add normalized
ORACLE outputs beside future regression tests instead.

The import intentionally excludes `.DS_Store` and keeps scientific `.log` and
`.out` files that are needed by Gaussian/QM adapter regressions.
